description: @trial_mix for Eckard & Kyonka (2018) peak procedure: FI18s LH3s baseline, 45 FI trials + 15 probe trials (54s, unreinforced) per session. Uses structured components array.
_note: Actual Eckard & Kyonka (2018) parameters. Structured components array: role='reinforced' tags the FI component (ref=0), role='probe' tags the EXT component (ref=1). The 'duration' field is probe-specific per role_catalog. Runtime seed/shuffling delegated to execution_profile.

description: @trial_mix for Roberts (1981) classical peak procedure: FI30s baseline, 90s probes, ordering_spec defaulted
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=30}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=10, duration=90s}])

Mix(FI30s, EXT)
_note: ordering_spec omitted (defaults to 'random'). Single-line components form tests parser handling of structured values in flat syntax.

description: @trial_mix applied to Mult (discriminated peak with stimulus cueing)
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=40}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=20, duration=60s}], ordering_spec="random")

Mult(FI20s, EXT)
_note: Mult provides discriminative stimuli distinguishing reinforced vs. probe components; same @trial_mix syntax applies.

description: @trial_mix for Baker et al. (1991) reinstatement: EXT background + 4 response-independent reinforcers on FT60s
_note: Baker, Steinwald & Bouton (1991): 4 response-independent reinforcers on FT60s interleaved with EXT. role='extinction' carries only ref (no count needed — background). role='reinstatement' carries count and optional interval.

description: @trial_mix reinstatement with interval attribute omitted (inferred from FT ref)
input:
@trial_mix(type="reinstatement", components=[{role="extinction", ref=0}, {role="reinstatement", ref=1, count=8}])

Mix(EXT, FT120s)
_note: 'interval' omitted from role='reinstatement' object: runtime infers 120s from FT120s (ref=1). ordering_spec defaults to 'random' per schema.

description: @trial_mix for Church & Deluty (1977) temporal bisection: 2s short, 8s long, 5 intermediate probes log-spaced
_note: Church & Deluty (1977) 5 probes logarithmically spaced: 2*(4)^(k/6) for k=1..5. role='probe' under temporal_bisection type requires 'durations' (array<time_value>) instead of the peak-style scalar 'duration'. Each object is self-contained with role-specific attributes.

input:
@trial_mix(components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s LH3s, EXT)

description: Component object without 'role' field triggers TRIAL_MIX_COMPONENT_MISSING_ROLE
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)

description: Component object without 'ref' field triggers TRIAL_MIX_COMPONENT_MISSING_REF
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)

description: Two components with identical ref triggers TRIAL_MIX_DUPLICATE_REF
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=0, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)

description: Component ref beyond Mix component count triggers TRIAL_MIX_INVALID_REF
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=5, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)

description: Component role not in catalog triggers TRIAL_MIX_UNKNOWN_ROLE
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="baseline", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)
_note: 'baseline' is not a role registered in role_catalog (valid peak roles: 'reinforced', 'probe').

description: Role valid in catalog but not allowed for declared type triggers TRIAL_MIX_UNEXPECTED_ROLE
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}, {role="extinction", ref=0}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)
_note: 'extinction' is a valid role for reinstatement type, not peak.

description: components missing a required role for the type triggers TRIAL_MIX_MISSING_REQUIRED_ROLE
_note: peak requires both 'reinforced' and 'probe' roles; 'probe' is missing.

description: peak probe without 'duration' attribute triggers TRIAL_MIX_COMPONENT_MISSING_ATTR
input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15}])

Mix(FI18s, EXT)
_note: role='probe' under type='peak' requires 'duration' per role_catalog.

input:
@trial_mix(type="peak", components=[{role="reinforced", ref=0, count=45}, {role="probe", ref=1, count=15, duration=54s}])

MTS(samples=3, comparisons=3)
_note: MTS is Operant.TrialBased (discrete-trial). For MTS probe testing, use @testing (procedure-stimulus) instead.

description: temporal_bisection probe durations outside [short, long] range triggers TRIAL_MIX_PROBE_OUT_OF_ANCHOR_RANGE
input:
@trial_mix(type="temporal_bisection", components=[{role="short_anchor", ref=0, duration=2s, count=20}, {role="long_anchor", ref=1, duration=8s, count=20}, {role="probe", ref=2, count=10, durations=["1s", "4s", "10s"]}])

Mix(FI2s, FI8s, EXT)

description: malformed time string in probe.durations triggers TRIAL_MIX_INVALID_DURATION_LIST
input:
@trial_mix(type="temporal_bisection", components=[{role="short_anchor", ref=0, duration=2s, count=20}, {role="long_anchor", ref=1, duration=8s, count=20}, {role="probe", ref=2, count=10, durations=["three_seconds", "4s"]}])

Mix(FI2s, FI8s, EXT)
